Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Sorry for making you come all the way up here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}S-Sorry! But we might disturb everyone in the dorms.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}...Would you have a practice match with me? Right here, right now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}It's just, now we're going up against that thing that lived inside of you, right, {f 4 1}-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I thought if we sparred, I could get an idea of how well I would do against it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}...I trained in secret for a long time, so I could avenge my mom's death.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}That was the only time I could forget the pain—when I was alone, swinging my spear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I want to use this power to help me live my own life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}I promised that I'd see this through to the end. I have to make good on that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Anyway, I want you to see me the way I am now, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Of course, I don't want us to actually get hurt, so I'll be using this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Please take this seriously. Otherwise, there's no point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}...I never noticed you could see the stars so clearly up here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}You were just as strong as I thought, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I had no chance. At least now I know where I stand compared to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Although, it is still frustrating to see such a difference in our skills.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I'm all right. But I am glad I decided to use toy weapons![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}...{f 4 1}-san, I don't know what decision you'll make in the end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}But as long as there's time, I won't stop training.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}So, would you mind if I challenged you again sometime?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Thank you! I'll get closer to beating you, just wait![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}...That's fair. It's not easy to say for sure.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Still, I plan to do the most that I can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Either way, there's not much time left. I'll just have to cram ten years' worth of experience into my training.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I've made so many memories since coming to this dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}But I feel like "living" means carrying it all with you and moving forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I used to think I didn't have a place to call home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}But I realized, that's not something you get from someone else.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Home—my real home—is the place that helps me move forward.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}That's why I believe fighting to come back here is what Aragaki-san would've wanted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}I've learned that everyone at the dorm has their own reasons for staying.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}And that means I need to do my best, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}I never would've figured that out if I didn't have you all behind me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}I like being on the rooftop at night, but maybe it's too cold to be out here in December.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Can we talk some more inside? I'd like to go over today's battle before I forget.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Oh and while we're at it, you should say hi to Hamburger too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Maybe it's because it's winter, but his fur's gotten so fluffy and cute.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After chatting with Amada in his[n]room, I headed back to mine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was inspired by how honest[n]Amada was with his feelings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_SPUP_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Max SP has increased by 3.[n]{f 1 1}
